zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger de Chandos 1st Baron Chandos於大約1270年出生在英國賀福爾維林頓時，他的父親Roger de Chandos21歲，母親Alice de Chandos20歲。他於1303年之前與Catherine Talbot結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1353年9月24日在英國賀福爾福普享年84歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀福爾賀福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger de Chandos 1st Baron Chandos于大约1270年出生在英国賀福爾維林頓时，他的父亲Roger de Chandos21岁，母亲Alice de Chandos20岁。他于1303年之前与Catherine Talbot结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1353年9月24日在英国賀福爾福普享年84岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀福爾賀福德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Chandos
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Candos in Illeville-sur-Montfort (Eure).

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de Chandos 1st Baron Chandos was born about 1270, in Wellington, Herefordshire, England, his father, Roger de Chandos, was 21 and his mother, Alice de Chandos, was 20. He married Catherine Talbot before 1303. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 24 September 1353, in Fownhope, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 84, and was buried in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger de Chandos 1st Baron Chandos est né environ 1270, à Wellington, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Roger de Chandos, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Alice de Chandos, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Catherine Talbot avant 1303. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 24 septembre 1353, à Fownhope, Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterré à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger de Chandos 1st Baron Chandos um 1270 in Wellington, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Chandos 21 und seine Mutter Alice de Chandos 20. Er hat vor 1303 Catherine Talbot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 24. September 1353 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Fownhope, Herefordshire, England und wurde in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Chandos 1st Baron Chandos è nato il circa 1270 nel Wellington, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Roger de Chandos, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Alice de Chandos, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Catherine Talbot prima del 1303. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 24 settembre 1353, nel Fownhope, Herefordshire, England, all'età di 84 anni, e fu sepolto a Hereford, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger de Chandos 1st Baron Chandosが約1270年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウエリントンで生まれた時，父Roger de Chandosは21歳，母Alice de Chandosは20歳であった。1303年以前にCatherine Talbotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1353年9月24日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアフォウンhオペで84歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Chandos 1st Baron Chandos(이)가 대략 1270년 영국 허퍼드실르 웰잉턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Chandos(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Chandos(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1303년 이전 Catherine Talbot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1353년 9월 24일 영국 허퍼드실르 파운홉에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Chandos 1st Baron Chandos nasceu aproximadamente 1270, em Wellington, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger de Chandos, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Chandos, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine Talbot antes 1303. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 24 de setembro de 1353, em Fownhope, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 84 anos, e foi sepultado em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de Chandos 1st Baron Chandos родился около 1270 г. в местности веллингтон, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger de Chandos было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Alice de Chandos, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine Talbot перед 1303 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 24 сентября 1353 г. в местности фоуноп, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 84 лет и был похоронен в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Catherine Talbot antes de 1303. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 24 de septiembre de 1353, en Fownhope, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 84 años, y fue sepultado en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
